introSection: Imorinth (Japanese: いもりんす) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Himeji Central Park in Himeji, Hyōgo, Japan.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.

fullText:
Imorinth (Japanese: いもりんす) is a steel kiddie roller coaster currently located at Himeji Central Park in Himeji, Hyōgo, Japan.



Blue track and white supports.

The train is designed to resemble a caterpillar.


 * Imorinth on the parks website (Japanese)
